title: BEM-850 triad gate
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:42 (UTC+3)'
gate=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_TRIAD_REGRESSION_GATE.md')
gate.write_text('''# BEM-850 | Triad Regression Gate

Дата: 2026-05-24 | 21:42 (UTC+3)
Статус: active_policy

## Правило

Любой новый цикл GPT ↔ Claude считается успешным только при наличии всех трёх доказательств:

| Proof | Файл / признак | PASS условие |
|---|---|---|
| Dispatch result | `governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json` | Есть status-файл запуска Claude dispatcher |
| Claude runtime | `governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json` | Есть `started_at` или `completed_at` |
| Real response | `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*` | Есть `Decision:` и это не `NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL` / не runtime blocker |

## Запрет

Без triad-proof нельзя писать `APPROVED`, нельзя повышать протокол до финального статуса и нельзя считать задачу согласования завершённой.

## Следующее действие

Поддерживать этот gate как обязательную проверку перед каждым отчётом по согласованию.
''')
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':'triad_regression_gate_installed','gate':str(gate),'next_action':'continue roadmap with triad gate enforced','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_install_triad_regression_gate.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_install_triad_regression_gate.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Install Triad Regression Gate | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: continue roadmap with BEM-850 triad regression gate enforced. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: triad_regression_gate_installed'+sep+'Next: continue roadmap with triad gate enforced.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(gate),'governance/state/bem850_install_triad_regression_gate.json','governance/reports/bem850_install_triad_regression_gate.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Installed triad regression gate policy so future GPT-Claude agreement cycles cannot pass without dispatch result, runtime state, and real Claude response')
"""
